anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1200: Luffy vs. Blackbeard Final Clash Begins
anime_pulse_items.summary: The long-awaited final battle in One Piece kicks off as Luffy and Blackbeard face off on Pirate Island. Chapter 1200 reveals Blackbeard's third Devil Fruit ability, shocking fans. Theories about the One Piece treasure reach fever pitch.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Anime Adaptation Announced for 2027
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio MAPPA announces a brand new Death Note anime series, adapting the manga more faithfully and adding new scenes. The announcement drops on the 20th anniversary of the original anime, with a teaser trailer revealing a darker art style.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: Boruto Two Blue Vortex Chapter 20 - Boruto Uses New Jutsu
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto reveals a new technique combining Uzumaki and Otsutsuki powers, defeating a Code-level threat. The chapter sets up the final arc with Sasuke's return. Fans debate Boruto's power scaling compared to Naruto.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Episode 10: Goku's New Form Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: Dragon Ball Daima continues with Goku unlocking a unique form tied to the Demon Realm. Episode 10 breaks viewership records on Crunchyroll, with fans comparing it to Ultra Instinct. Merchandise pre-orders explode.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Manga: Gojo Returns in Shibuya Arc Flashback
anime_pulse_items.summary: Jujutsu Kaisen manga releases a shocking chapter depicting Gojo's past during the Shibuya Incident, revealing new details about his imprisonment. The chapter hints at a possible resurrection, causing massive fan theories on Reddit.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Arc Movie Breaks Box Office Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Demon Slayer Infinity Castle movie, third in the series, opens with $200 million worldwide in its first weekend. Fans praise the animation quality and emotional depth of the Hashira battles. Sequel announced for 2027.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Chapters Special Edition Blu-ray Sells Out
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Attack on Titan Final Chapters Blu-ray sells out globally within hours of release, featuring extended cuts and behind-the-scenes content. Fans discuss the ending's legacy and possible spin-offs on Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Manga: Final Arc - Deku vs All For One Climax
anime_pulse_items.summary: My Hero Academia manga reaches its climax as Deku faces All For One in a battle that determines the fate of Quirks. Chapter 420 reveals a tragic sacrifice. The manga is set to end in July 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2 Trailer: New Characters and Chaos
anime_pulse_items.summary: Chainsaw Man season 2 trailer drops, showing Denji in a new school setting with the International Assassins arc. Animation by MAPPA looks stunning. Release date set for July 2026, causing massive hype on YouTube.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3: New Mission in Berlint
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spy x Family season 3 episode 5 features the family taking on a dangerous mission involving a new villain. The episode trends on Twitter with #SpyxFamily. Movie announcement for 2027 confirmed by Wit Studio.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren takes home Anime of the Year at the 2026 Crunchyroll Awards, also winning Best Fantasy and Best Character. Season 2 announced for early 2027. The series' emotional storytelling continues to captivate global audiences.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Jeju Island Arc Premieres on Crunchyroll
anime_pulse_items.summary: Solo Leveling season 2 episode 1 adapts the Jeju Island arc with jaw-dropping action. Comparisons to the manhwa are favorable, with A-1 Pictures delivering top-tier animation. Fans binge-watch, causing Crunchyroll server issues.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 10 New Anime Licenses Including Classic Titles
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces 10 new licenses for simulcast, including remasters of Cowboy Bebop and Trigun, plus a new original anime 'Starfall'. The platform expands its library to compete with Netflix, starting simulcasts from May 12.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix Announces Live-Action One Piece Season 2 Cast
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals the cast for One Piece live-action season 2, including new actors for Chopper and Robin. Filming begins in June. Fans are divided on the casting choices, but the series remains highly anticipated.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit Anime Community Explodes Over Boruto vs Naruto Power Debate
anime_pulse_items.summary: A thread on r/anime comparing Boruto and Naruto's power levels goes viral, with over 50k comments. The debate spills into r/whowouldwin. Fans analyze feats from Two Blue Vortex, sparking memes and fan art.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Merchandise Line Sells Out Worldwide
anime_pulse_items.summary: Bandai's Dragon Ball Daima action figures and apparel sell out within days of release. The new form from episode 10 drives demand. Resale prices triple on eBay. Fans clamor for restocks.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Teaser: Culling Games Arc Coming
anime_pulse_items.summary: A teaser for Jujutsu Kaisen season 3 confirms the Culling Games arc adaptation, with a 2027 release window. Fans analyze the brief footage for hints about animation quality. The subreddit trends with theories.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: Light Yagami Statue by Good Smile Company Sells Out
anime_pulse_items.summary: A high-end Death Note statue of Light Yagami with Ryuk sells out instantly on Good Smile Company. Priced at $300, it becomes a collector's item. The anniversary of the series drives nostalgia and sales.
